recipes.name: capability-overview
recipes.title: Capability Overview
recipes.description: Inventory the currently registered capabilities, adapters, and workflow surfaces before deciding what to execute.
completion_checks: List callable tools separately from resources and resource templates.
Call out which capabilities mutate state or require approval.
recipes.prompt_prelude: Start from the capability catalog instead of repo documentation. Read resources first, then decide whether any callable tool is actually needed.

recipes.name: claim_next_team_task
recipes.title: Claim Next Team Task
recipes.description: Claim the next available team workflow task assigned to you or unassigned.
completion_checks: Persist the workflow run state after each meaningful step.
Verify approval state before mutating shared state.
Confirm which thread or agent owns the claimed task.
recipes.caution: This workflow can mutate shared state. Confirm approvals before making irreversible changes.
recipes.prompt_prelude: Use `claim_next_team_task` as the primary workflow anchor. Confirm the required capabilities are available before execution, and persist workflow state after each significant step.

recipes.name: plan
recipes.title: Plan
recipes.description: Emit a plan item and persist it into workflow state.
completion_checks: Persist the workflow run state after each meaningful step.
Verify approval state before mutating shared state.
Ensure the recorded plan is concrete enough for execution or review.
recipes.caution: This workflow can mutate shared state. Confirm approvals before making irreversible changes.
recipes.prompt_prelude: Use `plan` as the primary workflow anchor. Confirm the required capabilities are available before execution, and persist workflow state after each significant step.
